application_variant_ref.description: Variant reference; resolves the latest revision on it.

application_revision_ref.description: Revision reference; resolves that exact revision.

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for embedded references. Protects against runaway recursion. Defaults to `10`.

max_embeds.title: Max Embeds
max_embeds.description: Maximum total number of embedded references to follow. Defaults to `100`.

error_policy.description: How to handle resolution errors. `exception` (default) aborts; `placeholder` substitutes a marker; `keep` leaves the original reference untouched.

schema.title: ApplicationRevisionResolveRequest
schema.description:
Request body for `POST /applications/revisions/resolve`.

Fetches a revision and resolves any embedded references (snippets, linked
revisions) inside its `data`. Use when clients need the fully-inlined
configuration instead of the raw stored form.
